title: Panforte with Charred Leek and Italian Herbs
description: A classic Italian dessert reimagined with charred leek and a hint of Italian herbs.
instructions: Char the leeks by grilling them over medium heat for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly blackened.
Slice the charred leeks into thin rings.
In a small bowl, mix together the Italian herbs, honey, and lemon zest.
Add the herb mixture to the panforte cubes and toss to coat.
Place the panforte cubes on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
To assemble, place a few slices of charred leek on a serving plate, top with a few cubes of panforte, and drizzle with the herb mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, finishing with a layer of panforte on top.
